seoTitle: Round Swamp vs Rous — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Round Swamp and Rous. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Round Swamp vs Rous: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Round Swamp and Rous.
heading: Round Swamp vs Rous — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Round Swamp, New South Wales and Rous, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Round Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Rous (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Round Swamp or Rous safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Round Swamp has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Rous scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Round Swamp scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Rous scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Round Swamp or Rous?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Round Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
